pages.raw_text:
"Phat we made is raform. Give US
big punches av raform an we'll be
Their foinest city in the NORTHWEST.
Wit them gamblers goin' t" Panama
an Borneo and Poortlan' an tn ither
island possessions. and we an Woydt
in charge TIL town has mighty good
chanel t. be saved"


Such was the soliloquy of Police
Sergeant John Sullivan as he and
Chief Woydt were ending one of their
conferences for the moral improve
ment of Spokane and it's citizens
plan that had already resolved it
self into a decision to engage John
G. Woolley the famous temperance
lecturer to deliver addresses just
prior to arresting the natives for
blowing strong breaths in the direc-
ton Of the city hall.


You're right, John" chimed in the
chief as he smoked up again.


Now. chief, I perpose fer t give
tn people two chancts fer t quit
their evil ways as soon as Woolley
comes. First, Woolley will address,
the mulchitude in open matin'. This.
sicon, Woolley shall adriss thin agin
and then me an you shall swoop
